ismg.criterion: Creating an extended response in Italian — Responding and creating

descriptors: • addresses the three different focuses related to the subject matter in Italian
• addresses two of the different focuses related to the subject matter in Italian
• addresses one of the different focuses related to the subject matter in Italian
The student response does not match any of the descriptors above.

ismg.criterion: Creating an extended response in Italian — Responding (language elements)

descriptors:
• constructs meaning by applying comprehensive and complex knowledge of language
elements with minor errors in the use of
- wide range of vocabulary
- wide range of grammar
- punctuation
- consistent register
- spelling

• constructs meaning by applying comprehensive knowledge of language elements with
minor errors in the use of
- wide range of vocabulary
- wide range of grammar
- punctuation
- register
- spelling

• constructs meaning by applying knowledge of language elements with minor errors in the
use of
- range of vocabulary
- range of grammar
- punctuation
- register
- spelling

• constructs meaning by applying some knowledge of language elements with some errors in
use of
- vocabulary
- grammar
- punctuation
- register
- spelling
• repetitive use of Italian language elements and vocabulary
• fragmented use of Italian
The student response does not match any of the descriptors above.

ismg.criterion: Creating an extended response in Italian — Responding (communication)

descriptors:
• communicates with discerning selection, sequencing and synthesis of information to justify
conclusions, ideas and perspectives appropriate to the task and text type

• communicates with effective selection, sequencing and synthesis of information to justify
conclusions, ideas and perspectives appropriate to the task and text type

• communicates with selection, sequencing and synthesis of information to justify
conclusions, ideas and perspectives appropriate to the task and text type

• communicates with some selection and sequencing of information with some justification of
conclusions/ideas/perspectives appropriate to the task
• a written response with some selection and sequencing of information/ideas
• disjointed use of Italian
The student response does not match any of the descriptors above.

ismg.criterion: Exchanging information and ideas in Italian — Language elements

descriptors:
• constructs meaning in response to stimulus by applying comprehensive knowledge of
language elements in a conversation with minor errors in the use of
- wide range of vocabulary
- wide range of grammar
- pronunciation
- consistent register
- intonation

• constructs meaning in response to stimulus by applying knowledge of language elements in
a conversation with minor errors in the use of
- range of vocabulary
- range of grammar
- pronunciation
- register
- intonation

• constructs meaning in response to stimulus by applying some knowledge of language
elements with some errors in a conversation in the use of
- vocabulary
- grammar
- pronunciation
- register
- intonation

• uses some Italian language in a conversation, including repetitive use of
- vocabulary
- grammar
• fragmented use of Italian in a conversation
The student response does not match any of the descriptors above.

ismg.criterion: Exchanging information and ideas in Italian — Communication

descriptors:
• demonstrates discerning selection and sequencing of ideas in an unprepared conversation
with proficiency and spontaneity

• demonstrates effective selection and sequencing of ideas in an unprepared conversation
with proficiency and spontaneity

• demonstrates selection and sequencing of ideas in an unprepared conversation with some
proficiency

• demonstrates fragmented selection and sequencing of ideas, or delivers a rehearsed set of
responses
• disjointed use of Italian
The student response does not match any of the descriptors above.
